## Test suite

Which suite should this fall under?

- [ ] `@smoke` — basic availability
- [ ] `@navigation` — links and routing
- [ ] `@forms` — form fields and validation
- [ ] `@functional` — business features and user flows
- [ ] `@visual` — screenshot regression
- [ ] `@responsive` — viewport-specific layout
